mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates reduce discount rates applied to equity cash flows, generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive 20d returns in >60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms robust consumer spending momentum, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields negative returns in >55% of cases over 60 days.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated industrial production levels indicate strong manufacturing output and supply chain stability, supporting positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) during supply shock regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation readings above 235.0 trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Returns remain positive in >65% of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirms labor market tightening, supporting corporate earnings and positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: High real GDP growth rates reflect strong aggregate demand and corporate revenue expansion, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show no correlation (Rank IC < 0.01) with quarterly GDP prints.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 105.0 indicates manufacturing contraction and weakening supply-side momentum, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative signal fails to predict downturns (accuracy < 50%) during contraction phases.
